data.title: TGS wins massive streamer contract in Indonesia, covering 10,000 sq km offshore.
data.description: A prominent energy data and intelligence provider, TGS, has recently secured a significant streamer contract in Indonesia's offshore region, encompassing roughly 10,000 square kilometers. The contract award was disclosed in Oslo, Norway, on 25th August 2025.

data.title: Tokenized RWAs have massive potential in $400T TradFi market, hitting all-time high value, say researchers.
data.description: The value of RWA tokenization has experienced a significant increase, reaching an all-time high. Researchers are optimistic about potential future growth, especially considering that Traditional Finance (TradFi) has an addressable market of approximately $400 trillion.

data.title: LG showcases energy-efficient commercial laundry solutions at Clean Show 2025 in Orlando to boost NA growth. SEOUL, Aug. 25, 2025.
data.description: A leading company from SEOUL, South Korea, LG Electronics, showcased its latest energy-efficient innovations at a prominent tradeshow in Orlando on Aug. 25, 2025. With a focus on boosting profitability and growth in the North American market, LG presented its advanced commercial laundry solutions at the Clean Show. The company aims to leverage these technologies to enhance its market presence and cater to the increasing demand for energy-efficient appliances. The event served as a platform for LG to highlight its commitment to sustainability and offer innovative solutions for businesses. This strategic move is expected to contribute significantly to LG's expansion plans in the region and reinforce its position as a key player in the industry.

data.title: Elliptic Labs signs multi-year agreement with major laptop customer, solidifying commitment to deploy AI platform.
data.description: In Oslo, Norway, Elliptic Labs has recently announced a significant development in the form of a multi-year agreement with one of its existing laptop customers. this agreement solidifies their commitment to implementing Elliptic Labs' AI Platform on a larger scale.

data.title: 1st International Humanoid Olympiad at International Olympic Academy in Ancient Olympia on August 29-September 2, 2025. Organized by Acumino and Endeavor Greece. Promotes Robotics and Physical AI.
data.description: In Ancient Olympia, Greece, the 1st International Humanoid Robot Olympiad is set to happen at the International Olympic Academy from August 29 to September 2, 2025. The event is co-organized by Acumino and Endeavor Greece. The Olympiad will focus on Robotics and Physical Artificial Intelligence (Physical AI), aiming to exhibit the potential of humanoid robots. Keynote speeches, technical discussions, and presentations will highlight the abilities of these robots. This milestone event will bring together experts, enthusiasts, and industry leaders to explore the advancements in humanoid robotics.

data.title: Stocks expected to be in focus: PDD Holdings may report $1.69 EPS and $14.35 billion revenue. PDD shares rose 0.6% after hours.
data.description: This morning, U.S. stock futures are trading with a mix as investors focus on various stocks. The attention is on PDD Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: PDD) as Wall Street anticipates the company to announce quarterly earnings of $1.69 per share with revenue totaling $14.35 billion before the market opens. PDD shares saw a 0.6% increase, reaching $127.83 in after-hours trading. FiscalNote Holdings Inc. (NYSE: NOTE) also made disclosures. For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.
